channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rare Ferrari Collection Discovered in Essex Warehouse Following Mechanic’s Passing
item.description: A remarkable collection of classic Ferrari cars, worth an estimated £600,000, has been discovered inside a sealed warehouse in the Essex countryside. The collection, belonging to the late Eddie Walsh,...

item.title: New Oil Storage Facility at Dar Port to End Fuel Shortages
item.description: The Oil Receiving and Storage Tanks Construction Project at Dar es Salaam's Port in Kigamboni is progressing well, aiming to address fuel shortages in Tanzania. Once completed, the facility will signi...

item.title: KSE-100 recovers 5,000 points after historic drop amid geopolitical tensions
item.description: Pakistan’s stock market showed a notable recovery on Tuesday as the KSE-100 index gained 5,159.10 points, closing at 157,132.09. This rebound came right after the biggest single-day decline in the his...

item.title: IAUE Vice Chancellor Advises New Students on Academic Integrity and Use of Library

item.title: Man arrested after stabbing incident in Birmingham leaves one injured

item.title: India has 25-day crude oil stock amid Iran-Israel tensions, says government

item.title: How Four People Overcame Debt Challenges and Found Financial Stability
item.description: Debt is a growing issue in the UK, affecting millions, with many individuals feeling trapped by financial pressures. The article highlights the stories of four people who faced overwhelming debt, ofte...

item.title: Egbetokun Still For Police IG House, Plots To Run For Ogun Senate After Forced Retirement

item.description: The article examines the mixed and often contradictory messages coming from the Trump administration regarding its actions in Iran. It questions the reasoning behind America's intervention in the regi...

item.title: Rising Middle East tensions push oil prices up, affecting South African fuel costs
item.description: Oil prices have climbed sharply as tensions in the Middle East intensify, putting pressure on the rand and raising the prospect of higher fuel costs for South Africans. The conflict has escalated as t...

item.title: Canadian Solar Companies Power Rural Africa with Innovative Solutions

item.title: Contestant quits Channel 4's Handcuffed show after confrontation with producer

item.title: Global Markets Slide as Escalating Middle East Conflict Drives Oil Surge and Inflation Concerns

item.title: Surprising Biodiversity Found in the Atacama Desert's Soil Ecosystems
item.description: A recent study led by the University of Cologne has revealed that the Atacama Desert, one of the driest places on Earth, is home to diverse and resilient life beneath its surface. Researchers focused ...
